summary: Agent envelopes must report explicitly live Bambu fetches as live, and daemon recipes must bound persistent event watches with a long timeout.
reason: The typed-output path defaulted every handwritten command to local provenance even after a fresh MQTT pushall, misleading agents about data freshness. Long-running integrations also need a documented timeout so supervisors can rotate the process predictably.
validated_outcome: A live printer status command emits meta.source=live, local history remains local, and strict SKILL plus Printing Press publish validation pass with the 24h daemon recipe.
